full_text:
Liu Mao 劉瑁
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Mao (劉瑁)was born in Jingling county, Jiangxia commandery. Brother to Liu Zhang, he fell ill and insane, dying shortly after. Liu Mao was affiliated with Liu Yan and Liu Zhang. Liu Mao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
